chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURTDERISHEET OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA DATE C.P. No. D-504 0[ 20 OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HONBLE UDGE For orders on office objection 01.11_ For Hcaring of main case This petition 145 filed 0n 28.04.2015, when the office raised certain objcctions which have not been complied with till date appears that the petitioner after this petition has not pursued this matter which shows tnat the petitioner has lost interest in the instant petition, therefore, the same is dismissed for non prosecution Judge |.2017 filinB
